title: cymbopogon iwarancusa subsp. olivieri
intro: Cymbopogon iwarancusa subsp. olivieri, also known as East Indian lemongrass, is a variant of the Cymbopogon iwarancusa plant, belonging to the family Poaceae and native to tropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate pain. The health benefits of Cymbopogon iwarancusa subsp. olivieri include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health concerns. Cymbopogon iwarancusa subsp. olivieri is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
